title: Bump main version to v1.4.0-dev
body:
Signed-off-by: Lokesh Mandvekar <lsm5@fedoraproject.org>


@vrothberg @mtrmac @rhatdan PTAL. v1.3.1 is already released.

comments.body:
Since we have a `1.3` branch, I think that the next version from the `main` branch should be 1.4.0.

@mtrmac WDYT?
Yeah, let’s not make it that easy to release 1.3.x from two different branches.
